addon.name: lmd
addon.description: Directive-driven Markdown for agent plans. Reusable macros, phase-isolation and single-sourcing keep plans token-lean and cache-safe — written hard against lean-ctx, inspired by MarkdownAI.
addon.author: dasTholo

addon.name: sequential-thinking
addon.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning tool — the official MCP reference server for breaking a hard problem into revisable thoughts.
addon.author: modelcontextprotocol

addon.name: everything
addon.description: Official MCP reference server that exercises every protocol feature — install it to verify your lean-ctx gateway can discover and call downstream tools.
addon.author: modelcontextprotocol
